title: RESA Internal Baseline Capture Planning
objective: Plan the smallest bounded follow-on after packets 020a through 020c for a RESA-internal, actor-attested baseline capture path that writes baseline truth through an authorized application path when P6-exported baseline data is unavailable, without implementing the write path yet and without broadening into UI stack redesign, work-package physical-home decisions, or multi-baseline history.
constrained_outputs: One bounded planning memo defining the mutation class, actor attestation rules, and validation gates for an internal baseline-capture path
One minimal follow-on implementation recommendation covering API seam shape, provenance requirements, and non-overload rules
No code, no SQL, no UI implementation, and no multi-baseline history decision
validation_steps: Confirm packet 020e is planning-only and does not implement a write path, SQL, or UI changes
Confirm the proposed path remains actor-attested, non-synthetic, and bounded by the governed operational write rules
Confirm multi-baseline history and WorkPackage physical-home decisions remain explicitly deferred
sql_permission_note: Packet 020e is planning-only. No SQL, no mutation implementation, and no UI or bridge changes are authorized.
